title: Display options for "Maybe these can help?"
excerpt: When typing an email to support the form keeps changing. As I type new words, the “Maybe these can help?” displays. If I close it, I’ll get another one in a few more words. Since it changes the text entry box every time …

posts.author: JNY (Jocelyn Yale)
posts.cookedHtml:
When typing an email to support the form keeps changing. As I type new words, the “Maybe these can help?” displays. If I close it, I’ll get another one in a few more words. Since it changes the text entry box every time it pops out, it’s disrupting and annoying.

Please provide a way to perma-close “Maybe these can help?”. If not completely, then at least for the current message.
